title: P@lalyah #6421
definition:
Pelaliah = "Jehovah has judged"

 1) son of Amzi and ancestor of Adaiah the priest in the time of Nehemiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Pelaliah = "Jehovah has judged"

 1) son of Amzi and ancestor of Adaiah the priest in the time of Nehemiah

    NASB:  Yah has interposed, an Isr. priest
